message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam componentStyle rectangle

participant "PackageManager" as PackageManager
participant "ApplicationPackageManager" as ApplicationPackageManager
participant "PackageManagerService" as PackageManagerService
participant "ActivityIntentResolver" as ActivityIntentResolver
participant "IntentResolver" as IntentResolver

activate PackageManager
activate ApplicationPackageManager
activate PackageManagerService
activate ActivityIntentResolver
activate IntentResolver

PackageManager -> PackageManager : queryIntentActivities
PackageManager -> ApplicationPackageManager : queryIntentActivitiesAsUser
ApplicationPackageManager -[dotted]-> PackageManagerService : queryIntentActivities
PackageManagerService <-[dotted]- PackageManagerService : queryIntentActivitiesInternal
PackageManagerService -> ActivityIntentResolver : queryIntent
ActivityIntentResolver -> IntentResolver : queryIntent

deactivate PackageManager
deactivate ApplicationPackageManager
deactivate PackageManagerService
deactivate ActivityIntentResolver
deactivate IntentResolver

@enduml
```
